title: Tone down BYOP and earning language
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Less pitch, more pixel
gist.blurb: We've toned down the salesy language around Bring Your Own Provider (BYOP) and Pollen credits. We're an open-source community, not a timeshare presentation.
gist.summary: Updated frontend copy to remove aggressive promotional language around BYOP and Pollen credits, replacing it with simpler, community-focused messaging.
gist.impact: Users will see cleaner, more informative text when submitting apps or configuring their own providers.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating flashy corporate marketing brochures while Polly the bee holds a simple, cozy wooden sign. Represents removing 'salesy' language in favor of organic community vibes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating a stack of flashy corporate marketing brochures. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a simple, elegant wooden sign. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
